title: Taskify
description: A minimal and intuitive task management app built with React and local storage persistence.

title: WeatherVue
description: A clean weather dashboard that provides real-time forecasts using the OpenWeather API.

title: DevConnect
description: A social platform for developers to share projects, post updates, and collaborate on ideas.

title: PixelPaint
description: A lightweight in-browser drawing tool with brush controls, color picker, and export to PNG.

title: ChatSphere
description: A real-time chat application supporting group rooms, typing indicators, and message history.

title: BookShelf
description: A personal book tracker that lets users catalog reads, rate books, and track progress over time.

title: FitTrack
description: A fitness companion app for logging workouts, tracking calories, and visualizing progress charts.

title: MarkdownMate
description: A live markdown editor with split preview, syntax highlighting, and one-click export to HTML.

title: CryptoDash
description: A cryptocurrency dashboard with live prices, market cap trends, and a watchlist feature.

title: PortfolioX
description: A customizable portfolio template with dark mode, smooth animations, and a contact form.
